content:
I gotta backtrack on Ava. She put a lot of effort in today. Went to a ton of stores to hand in her CV. She even asked about how to help better with baby sitting. Very proud. 
I still wish it was consistent but you have to appreciate the times things are good. 

Tried microdosing today. 0.1g. it was not enough to make a noticeable difference. More tomorrow? Probably. Haha
